purpose: Script additions for Phase 5 (Schema Parity Gate). Merge these into root package.json after Phase 1-1 (Jest 30 upgrade) completes to avoid merge conflicts.
notes: schema:dump: Dumps the full RN database schema (from all migrations) as normalized JSON to stdout or --output file.
Uses ts-node with a scripts-specific tsconfig that sets moduleResolution to 'node' (the root tsconfig uses 'bundler' which ts-node does not support).
